name: Autonomous Data Governance Assistant
description: Agentic data-quality and governance platform: a team of LLM-powered agents discover, profile, classify, generate DQ rules, execute them, and trend results across snapshots of a SQLite mortgage dataset, exposed via FastAPI.

agents.name: discovery_agent
agents.role: Builds the technical catalogue of tables and columns.

agents.name: classification_agent
agents.role: Tags PII / business categories per column.

agents.name: dq_rules_agent
agents.role: Synthesises data-quality rules from profiles + classifications.

agents.name: dq_executor_agent
agents.role: Executes rules against the snapshot and scores results.

agents.name: qa_agent
agents.role: Answers natural-language questions over results and trends.

data.dataset: mortgage_demo (8 tables: branches, loan_officers, customers, applications, loans, collaterals, payments, credit_history)
